notes.title: Figma cleanup
notes.text: The design team is going to kill me if I don't fix the spacing on the landing page mockup. Everything is currently 'pixel-perfect' (it's not).

notes.title: Auth bug #42
notes.text: The session token keeps expiring exactly 3 minutes early. Check the JWT expiration logic again. It's definitely a timezone thing.

notes.title: Refactor script.js
notes.text: I promised I'd clean this up two weeks ago. It's a mess of template clones and manual DOM manipulation. Future me will be grateful.

notes.title: C# Project
notes.text: Finish the C# project. It's due next week.

notes.title: History Essay
notes.text: First draft of 'How the Steam Engine Ruined My Sleep Schedule'. Need to find at least three sources that aren't Wikipedia.

notes.title: Physics Lab
notes.text: Upload the CSV data from Friday's experiment. The pendulum results look suspicious, but we're rolling with it.

notes.title: Grocery run
notes.text: Out of coffee and oat milk. Also, try to buy something green this time. No more frozen pizza for a week.

notes.title: Dentist (pain)
notes.text: Appointment at 2:00 PM. Don't forget to lie about how often I floss. Hope it's not another cavity.

notes.title: Book Flights
notes.text: Check if prices for the Berlin trip dropped. If not, just bite the bullet and book. Use the points if possible.
